title: clitandra togolana
intro: Clitandra togolana, also known as the African forest tree or Clitandra, is a plant species native to West and Central Africa. Clitandra togolana is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems, as well as to boost the immune system and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Clitandra togolana typically involve boiling the leaves or roots to create teas or infusions, which are then consumed to reap its health benefits.
